description: Tests if the bug is specific to p-for or affects ALL directives on slotted content. Uses p-text directive instead of p-for. If this passes, the bug is p-for specific. If it fails, the bug affects all directives.

assertNodes.description: The div with p-text directive should resolve state.Message from the page's Response, not the layout's Response.

assertOnDirective.name: p-text
assertOnDirective.description: state.Message must resolve to the page's Response.Message field.
